title: Containers-policy.json and keyless signing
body:
Is it possible to use Fulcio and Rekor to for keyless signing? I see them both referenced here: https://man.archlinux.org/man/containers-policy.json.5.en, but I am not sure how to implement it in my policy.json config or if it is even an option yet. 

I was able to verify the image with cosign verify, now I just need to figure out how to get the container policy to accept it.

comments.body:
There is `sigstoreSigned`, matching on `subjectEmail` or `subjectHostname`.

We have no ambition to replicate the whole cosign feature / option set.

Perhaps also see the design discussion around containers/image#2235 for expanding the accepted subject identifiers.
Almost a year later, this is not asking for any specific feature we should track as a task, so, closing.
